---
title: "Publications"
format: 
  html:
    anchor-sections: false
    toc: true
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .quarto-title {
            display: none;
          }
          </style>
          <script async src="https://badge.dimensions.ai/badge.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "year desc"
    template: ../partials/listings/publication_articles.ejs   
---

## Scientific articles

:::{#articles}
:::
